summary: Affiliate workspace mode gated behind a Vietnamese out-of-scope shell in AuthenticatedShell; seller mode retains dark theme and workflow UI. Mode switcher and localStorage persistence unchanged.

interfaceChanges.description: Phase 1 out-of-scope panel shown for affiliate mode on authenticated routes.
Replaces page children with AffiliateOutOfScope when workspace mode is affiliate.

mappings.criterion: Seller mode applies dark theme; affiliate mode applies light theme
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_workspace_mode_out_of_scope.test.tsx::toggles to seller mode without logout and hides out-of-scope

mappings.criterion: Every route in affiliate mode renders a clear Out of Scope message (Vietnamese)
Mode switcher toggles modes without logout
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_workspace_mode_out_of_scope.test.tsx::toggles to seller mode without logout and hides out-of-scope

mappings.criterion: Mode persists across refresh via existing storage convention
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_mode_selection_gate.test.tsx::persists seller mode, applies dark theme, and routes to /

mappings.criterion: Integration test: affiliate mode shows out-of-scope on at least home and one secondary route
Integration test: seller mode does not show out-of-scope on workflow routes
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_workspace_mode_out_of_scope.test.tsx::does not show out-of-scope on recommendations workflow route
